_comment: Mutation testing — the objective 'are the tests actually catching bugs' audit. Scoped to the pure, deterministic correctness core (the same modules the coverage gate watches); UI/native/data/hook files are excluded because they'd be slow and low-signal under the RN/expo mocks. On-demand / CI-nightly (~6–15 min), not per-commit. Run: pnpm mutation. Triage survivors in reports/mutation/mutation.html and add tests that kill them.
